title: Synthetic records disposition review
description: A non-operational example using invented training fixtures. It is not records-management or legal guidance and does not authorize retention or deletion.

decision.intent: Assign a demonstration disposition label to an invented record used in a training exercise.
decision.question: Which demonstration label should the fictional training record display?

evidenceRequirements.description: An invented inventory note identifying the fictional training fixture.

sources.title: Fictional training-fixture disposition schedule

citation.excerpt: Active example material receives the retain-demo label; retired example material receives the remove-demo-copy label.

sources.rights: Invented content for specification testing; not a legal or operational schedule.

outcomes.label: Retain demo fixture
outcomes.description: A demonstration label only; it does not authorize retention of any real record.

outcomes.label: Remove demo copy
outcomes.description: A demonstration label only; it does not delete anything or authorize records disposition.

outcomes.label: Review the label
outcomes.description: A person should inspect the synthetic inputs before choosing a demonstration label.

rules.description: Label active fictional example material for retention in the demo.
rules.rationale: This exact-match example exists solely to exercise the draft representation.

rules.description: Label retired fictional example material for removal from the demo copy.
rules.rationale: The outcome is a harmless display label and is not a deletion instruction.

escalation.message: Inspect only invented fixture data and choose a demonstration label; do not retain or delete real records.
